question: When was the Data Privacy Policy of NovaTech Inc. last updated?
answer_paragraph: Introduction: * This Data Privacy Policy was last updated on February 27, 2023.

question: What types of personal data does NovaTech Inc. collect?
answer: Name, Email address, Phone number, IP address, Location data
answer_paragraph: 1. Data Collection: * We collect the following types of personal data: * Name * Email address * Phone number * IP address * Location data

question: What is the purpose of collecting personal data by NovaTech Inc.?
answer: Providing our services to you, Improving our services, Marketing and advertising, Complying with legal requirements
answer_paragraph: 2. Data Usage: * We use your personal data for the following purposes: * Providing our services to you * Improving our services * Marketing and advertising * Complying with legal requirements

question: Who is responsible for overseeing the data protection practices of NovaTech Inc.?
answer_paragraph: 3. Data Protection: * We have a Data Protection Officer (DPO) who is responsible for overseeing our data protection practices.

question: How long does NovaTech Inc. retain personal data for marketing purposes?
answer_paragraph: 4. Data Retention: * We retain your personal data for the following periods: * 2 years for marketing purposes

question: What are the rights of users regarding their personal data?
answer: Right to access, Right to rectification, Right to erasure, Right to restriction of processing, Right to data portability, Right to object
answer_paragraph: 5. User Rights: * You have the following rights regarding your personal data: * Right to access * Right to rectification * Right to erasure * Right to restriction of processing * Right to data portability * Right to object

question: How can users exercise their rights regarding their personal data?
answer: By contacting our DPO at dpo@novatech.com
answer_paragraph: 5. User Rights: * You can exercise these rights by contacting our DPO at dpo@novatech.com.

question: What is the governing law of the Data Privacy Policy of NovaTech Inc.?
answer: The laws of the State of California
answer_paragraph: 8. Governing Law: * This policy is governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California.

question: How are disputes arising out of or related to the Data Privacy Policy resolved?
answer: Through arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association
answer_paragraph: 8. Governing Law: * Any disputes arising out of or related to this policy will be resolved through arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association.

question: What is the definition of personal data according to the Data Privacy Policy of NovaTech Inc.?
answer: Any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person
answer_paragraph: 9. Definitions: * Personal data: any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person.
